alerts.detail: RESOLVED this 14:01 ET run. The two untracked bot positions (COMP 2sh, AAL 2sh, opened 06-24, never persisted to state.positions) were CLOSED by the USER at ~13:21 ET: order 6a3d63ae COMP market SELL 2sh @ $10.965 (filled 17:21:51Z) and order 6a3d6396 AAL market SELL 2sh @ $17.585 (filled 17:21:26Z); their agentic GTC stop-limits (COMP 6a3bf3cf, AAL 6a3c01c6) were cancelled at 13:21 ET. get_equity_positions now shows ONLY BB 4sh (= this bot's 2 tracked lots); equity_value $42.62 reconciles to BB alone. No untracked positions or untracked resting orders remain. The prior HIGH alert UNTRACKED_BOT_POSITIONS_PERSISTENCE_FAILURE is cleared (no operator decision now needed). The ~$57 COMP/AAL sale proceeds are UNSETTLED today (cash-account T+1) -> not usable for new entries until they settle.

Today's 09:43 ET screener build: run_scan('Top Most Active Movers') reported total_items=261 but returned only 200 instrument rows; the remaining 61 were not retrievable. 52 of the 200 had mktcap>5B and were fully Stage-2 screened. Some of the 61 untruncated rows could in principle have been large-cap survivors but were not available. Did NOT call get_scans/create_scan (per Step 5). The screener in use today was built from this 200-row set.

RECURRING infra issue. THIS 14:01 ET run: container again started at STALE local HEAD a4c66d5 (= 06-24 09:01 state), BEHIND authoritative origin/main 6e938fc (= 06-25 13:01 state). Recovered by fetching origin/main with proxy bypass (git -c http.proxy= fetch origin main) and hard-resetting onto it BEFORE acting. Push via the same proxy-bypass + token URL (the url.insteadOf local_proxy rewrite returns 403). Operator should fix persistent remote credential + guarantee containers clone current main, else cross-run persistence keeps depending on this manual recovery.
